name: Mature Nephilim

abilities.name: Combat Finesse
abilities.text: When this model is targeted with a (missile) action, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: Blood Frenzy
abilities.text: Before performing a duel, this model may remove a Glutted token to receive a (+).

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

triggers.name: Meat for the Young
triggers.text: An ally within 6" gains a Glutted token.

triggers.name: Shove Aside
triggers.text: Once per activation. Move the target 4". Then, this model moves up to 4" and may declare a (melee) action targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Bloody Trophy
triggers.text: This model gains a Glutted token.

actions.name: Terrorize
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp away from this model.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Blacken the Skies
actions.costs_and_restrictions: All friendly models within (aura)2" with this action that have already activated this turn may declare this action.
actions.effects: Place this model within range. This model may not declare the Interact action this activation.

triggers.name: Heavy Landing
triggers.text: Enemies within (aura)1" must pass a TN 15 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

extraction_notes: Minion shows (2) which indicates model_limit of 2
